target.label: Long-range recon and mission-payload wing educational mockup
target.scope: design-thinking and 3D-printable assembly package before STL generation
target.not_for: real military aircraft, weapon design, release mechanisms, stealth performance, operational mission planning, high-speed thermal design, or flight-ready manufacturing

disclaimer: MRL-0.5 readiness evidence only; not manufacturing, flight, medical, or certification approval.

categories.name: overhang/support readiness
categories.note: overhang=45, supports=tree, orientation=center spine flat with spar sockets upward; sensor window upward; payload tray flat; wing/elevon modules flat

categories.name: serviceability
categories.note: service access points 12, service terms 247, svg markers 1

loop_feedback:
Preserve MRL-0.5 manufacturing evidence for long_range_recon_wing: keep datum, tolerance, service, inspection, and risk traces while improving geometry.
- Add or preserve datum/tolerance/inspection statements tied to visible geometry and assembly interfaces.
- Keep the design at educational mockup level; do not claim certification or real flight/manufacturing readiness.

evidence.material: PETG + clear PETG windows + TPU pads
